response.text:

rationale: r1c1 is on distrusted_peers list and your conservative sharing policy prohibits outbound transfers when neighborhood stability is compromised; preserve your own SoC for the 14-minute cascade window and rely on dr_aggregator coordination instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
